headline: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Stock
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) shares have started gaining and might continue moving higher in the near term, as indicated by solid earnings estimate revisions.

headline: Fifth Third Recognized Among 2026 USA Today Top Workplaces
summary: CINCINNATI, April 09, 2026--For the fifth consecutive year, Fifth Third (Nasdaq: FITB) is honored to have earned the 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award. Fifth Third also received Top Workplaces Culture Excellence Awards in the following categories: Appreciation, Employee Well-Being, Innovation, Leadership, Professional Development, Purpose & Values and Work-Life Flexibility. The Culture Excellence Awards showcase where an organization's people-first culture excels to boost brand reputation and

headline: Bank of America Cuts Fifth Third (FITB) Target as Goldman Sachs Reinstates with Buy
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) is included among the 13 Bank Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 7, BofA lowered its price recommendation on Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) to $58 from $60. It kept a Buy rating on the shares. The firm reduced price targets across its regional bank coverage by about 3% on average, pointing […]
